_comment: Operator-specific Cloudflare configuration for apply-cf-hardening.ps1 and export-cf-rules.ps1. Copy this file to cf-apply-config.local.json, fill in real values, and keep that copy gitignored. For CI/CD, store the full JSON as the CF_APPLY_CONFIG_JSON GitHub secret; the cf-apply workflow materialises it as cf-apply-config.local.json at runtime.
